description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named 'MiNiFi-CPP Verify Python Compatibility' that can be triggered manually. The workflow should have two jobs: 'centos-build' and 'docker-tests'. The 'centos-build' job runs on ubuntu-22.04, checks out the repository, caches ccache, installs dependencies, builds the centos package with python scripting enabled, and uploads the resulting tarball as an artifact. The 'docker-tests' job runs on ubuntu-20.04, depends on 'centos-build', and uses a matrix strategy to build and test docker images for multiple platforms with python scripting enabled.
